description: Style Note lucera, or ‘luminous star’ in Spanish, is designed for fashionistas who like to shine! Lucera fashion jewellery offers contemporary designs to complement the various moods of the modern and fashion conscious woman of today. What makes these earrings a must buy is the fact that these earrings are easily paired and will match most of the outfits in your wardrobe in elegance and style. Product Details Silver and gold coloured earrings Oval shaped curved earring with 1 row of CZ diamonds on either side and a row of CZ diamond and golden beads in the centre Material and Care Silver and CZ Diamonds Wipe with a cotton swab when needed
